title: Uniface Server
text: Uniface Server A server-based process that enables Uniface clients to access remote resources, or to execute remote components. By default, the Uniface Server acts as the Uniface Virtual Machine, and supports remote application invocation and remote data access. The Uniface Router is responsible for all communication between the client and server, except for exclusive Uniface Servers. Related Links Uniface Server A Uniface Server is a server-based process that handles requests for remote data and component execution that it receives from client applications.
